API docs

# REST API and webhooks for AcmeFlow workflows.

Developers can read account, workflow, event, and webhook resources. Production API credentials are managed by admins.

## Authentication

API requests use bearer tokens created by an account admin. Tokens can be scoped to read-only or workflow write access....

recommendations.title: Review and publish the agent action manifest
recommendations.whyItMatters: The scan found operable actions, but agents still need a stable public manifest instead of re-inferring forms from HTML.
recommendations.howToFix: Review the generated .well-known/agents.json, keep human confirmation on sensitive actions, and publish the approved manifest.
